theatres.name: Fungal Depths
theatres.description: Sections of the underhive where mutant fungi and toxic growths have taken over, creating a choking maze of spore-clouds and grasping tendrils. Visibility is near-zero and the air itself drives fighters into a frenzy.
theatres.tacticalBenefits: All three twists boost melee combat while crippling shooting. Melee gangs will dominate here.
theatres.recommendedTerrain: Dense organic-looking terrain with short sight lines. No long fire lanes.

twists.name: Rage Spores
twists.flavourText: Inhaling the drifting spores drives fighters into a frenzy of violence.
twists.rule: All models gain Furious and +1 to hit in melee. All shooting attacks suffer -1 to hit.

twists.name: Choking Clouds
twists.flavourText: Thick spore-clouds reduce visibility to arm's length, making ranged combat nearly impossible.
twists.rule: Maximum shooting range is 12". Models that shoot at targets more than 6" away suffer an additional -1 to hit.

twists.name: Grasping Tendrils
twists.flavourText: Writhing fungal tendrils drag combatants together and shield them from outside interference.
twists.rule: After melee, the charging player may choose not to separate. While engaged, models cannot be targeted by shooting attacks. All melee attacks gain AP(1).

theatres.name: The Killing Fields
theatres.description: Former industrial zones cleared by sustained bombardment, now nothing but rubble-strewn open ground with nowhere to hide. Long sight lines and elevated positions make this a shooter's paradise.
theatres.tacticalBenefits: All three twists reward shooting and punish attempts to close distance. Ranged gangs excel here.
theatres.recommendedTerrain: Sparse terrain with long sight lines. Few buildings, mostly low rubble and craters.

twists.name: Open Sightlines
twists.flavourText: With nothing to obstruct vision, every fighter is a potential target from across the battlefield.
twists.rule: All ranged weapons gain +6" range. Models not in cover terrain suffer -1 to Defense rolls against shooting.

twists.name: Killing Ground
twists.flavourText: The open approaches are perfect kill zones, and any attempt to cross them invites withering fire.
twists.rule: Models that Charge take a hit with AP(1) at the start of their activation as they cross the open ground. Models using Hold gain +1 to hit with shooting.

twists.name: Elevated Positions
twists.flavourText: Rubble mounds and ruined foundations provide perfect firing platforms for those who claim them first.
twists.rule: Models in cover terrain or on elevated terrain gain +1 to hit with shooting. Models that Charge must pass a Quality test or become Shaken after their attack.

theatres.name: Burnout Zone
theatres.description: Sectors gutted by fire and radiation, where only the toughest can survive. The weak are picked off quickly while heavily armoured fighters stride through the devastation unopposed.
theatres.tacticalBenefits: All three twists reward Tough(3)+ models and punish or ignore non-Tough models. Elite gangs dominate here.
theatres.recommendedTerrain: Sparse terrain clustered together with wide open gaps. Radiation markers optional.

twists.name: Scorched Earth
twists.flavourText: The devastated landscape offers no protection to the unarmoured, while heavy units surge forward.
twists.rule: Models with Tough(3) or higher gain Fast. All other models suffer -1 to Defense rolls.

twists.name: Radiation Pockets
twists.flavourText: Lingering radiation eats through light armour and exposed flesh, while the heavily protected endure.
twists.rule: At the start of each round after the first, models without Tough take a hit with AP(1). Models with Tough are immune.

twists.name: Dominant Presence
twists.flavourText: The largest fighters dominate the battlefield, their mere presence breaking the morale of lesser foes.
twists.rule: Models with Tough(3) or higher gain +1 to hit with all attacks. Enemy models within 6" of a Tough(3)+ model suffer -1 to hit.

theatres.name: Slag Heaps
theatres.description: Mountains of industrial waste and debris, constantly shifting underfoot. Heavy units sink and struggle while nimble fighters swarm through the refuse with ease.
theatres.tacticalBenefits: All three twists reward having many models and punish relying on a few elite fighters. Horde gangs excel here.
theatres.recommendedTerrain: Dense, cluttered terrain representing refuse piles. Difficult to navigate for large models.

twists.name: Treacherous Footing
twists.flavourText: The unstable ground shifts constantly, swallowing heavy fighters while light ones dance across the surface.
twists.rule: Models without Tough gain +2" to all movement and Strider. Models with Tough(3) or higher suffer -4" to all movement (minimum 3") and treat all terrain as Dangerous.

twists.name: Swarm Tactics
twists.flavourText: In the chaos of the slag heaps, numbers matter more than individual prowess.
twists.rule: Models within 3" of two or more friendly models gain +1 to hit with all attacks. Models with no friendly models within 6" suffer -1 to hit.

twists.name: Death by a Thousand Cuts
twists.flavourText: Surrounded by enemies on all sides, even the mightiest warrior will eventually fall.
twists.rule: When attacking a model, gain +1 AP for each other friendly model within 3" of the target (maximum AP+3). Models with Tough(3)+ cannot benefit from cover.

theatres.name: Hab-Stack Warrens
theatres.description: Towering hab-blocks with endless corridors, hidden passages, and countless ambush points. Those who know the warrens can strike from nowhere and vanish without a trace.
theatres.tacticalBenefits: All three twists reward sneaky deployment and punish straightforward approaches. Ambush-focused gangs thrive here.
theatres.recommendedTerrain: Dense buildings and ruins with many hiding spots. Multiple levels and blocked sight lines.

twists.name: Dense Cover
twists.flavourText: Every shadow hides a potential threat, every doorway conceals a killer.
twists.rule: All models gain Stealth. Maximum shooting range is 18". Models in cover terrain gain +2 to Defense instead of +1.

twists.name: Ambush Points
twists.flavourText: The warrens offer countless spots to lie in wait for the unwary.
twists.rule: All models gain Ambush. Models deploying via Ambush gain +1 to hit on all attacks during their first activation. Models that deployed normally suffer -1 to hit on Round 1.

twists.name: Hidden Passages
twists.flavourText: Secret tunnels and forgotten corridors allow fighters to appear anywhere.
twists.rule: Once per activation, any model may be placed within 3" of any terrain feature and more than 6" from enemies, then activate normally. Models that do this gain Stealth until their next activation.

theatres.name: The Dockyards
theatres.description: Brightly-lit cargo bays with floodlights blazing and clear firing lanes between containers. There's nowhere to hide here - only direct confrontation will carry the day.
theatres.tacticalBenefits: All three twists negate stealth tactics and reward aggressive, head-on engagement. Direct assault gangs excel here.
theatres.recommendedTerrain: Cargo containers and warehouses with clear lanes between them. Well-lit, open areas.

twists.name: Floodlights
twists.flavourText: Blazing industrial lighting illuminates every corner, leaving nowhere to hide.
twists.rule: Stealth has no effect. Models cannot benefit from Ambush or Scout deployment - all models must deploy normally. All shooting attacks gain +1 to hit.

twists.name: Clear Lanes
twists.flavourText: The orderly cargo rows create perfect kill corridors with no room for subtlety.
twists.rule: Cover terrain provides no Defense bonus. Models gain +1 to hit against targets that have not yet activated this round.

twists.name: Aggressive Advance
twists.flavourText: Fortune favours the bold - those who push forward are rewarded.
twists.rule: Models that Charge gain +1 to hit in melee and AP(1) on all melee attacks. Models that used Hold on their previous activation suffer -1 to Defense.

theatres.name: The Sump
theatres.description: The lowest depths where toxic sludge pools knee-deep and every step risks a twisted ankle or worse. Speed is death here - only the cautious survive.
theatres.tacticalBenefits: All three twists punish fast movement and reward careful, defensive play. Slow gangs that hunker down will outlast faster opponents.
theatres.recommendedTerrain: Industrial debris, pipes, pools of toxic waste. Difficult terrain throughout.

twists.name: Toxic Pools
twists.flavourText: Rushing through the sump means splashing through corrosive chemicals that eat through boots and armour.
twists.rule: Models that Rush or Charge take a hit with AP(2) at the end of their activation. Models that Advance take a hit with AP(0). Models using Hold are unaffected.

twists.name: Treacherous Ground
twists.flavourText: The unstable footing punishes those who move too quickly.
twists.rule: Models with Fast lose Fast. All models suffer -2" to Rush and Charge movement. Models using Hold gain +1 to hit with shooting.

twists.name: Defensive Positions
twists.flavourText: Those who find solid ground and hold it gain a crucial advantage.
twists.rule: Models that used Hold on their previous activation gain +1 to Defense and +1 to hit until their next activation. Models that Rush or Charge cannot benefit from cover.

theatres.name: Transit Corridors
theatres.description: Arterial passages where high-speed cargo trains once ran. The wide corridors and smooth floors reward those who keep moving, while those who stand still become easy targets.
theatres.tacticalBenefits: All three twists reward constant movement and punish static play. Fast gangs that stay mobile will dominate.
theatres.recommendedTerrain: Long corridors with minimal obstacles. Open spaces that allow full movement.

twists.name: Moving Targets
twists.flavourText: A fighter in motion is harder to track and hit.
twists.rule: Models that moved this activation gain +1 to Defense until their next activation. Models that used Hold suffer -1 to Defense until their next activation.

twists.name: Momentum
twists.flavourText: Speed is power in the corridors - the faster you move, the harder you hit.
twists.rule: Models that Rush gain +1 to hit on their next activation. Models that Charge gain +1 to hit and AP(1) in melee. Models with Fast gain an additional +1 to hit.

twists.name: Kill Zones
twists.flavourText: Standing still in the open corridors is suicide - keep moving or die.
twists.rule: At the start of each round after the first, models that used Hold on their previous activation take a hit with AP(1). Models that Rush or Charge gain Stealth until their next activation.
